name: Tiny Jimmy || Mouthwashing
description:
Walking into the bathroom, you see… Jimmy from the hit indie game Mouthwashing in your bottle of Mouthwash!?

Someone asked for it, so have fun with a mini Jimmy. Torture him for his horrible misdeeds! Or uh, whatever else you want.

Tags: Macro, Micro, Giant, Tiny, Giant POV, Giant User, Mouthwashing AU, macrophilia, microphilia, size difference.

CW and Dead Dove tag for backstory [Mention of SA]

Credits:

  • Also inspired by @Hiyouknowmenot ‘s Bitty AU Daisuke bot.
